_comment: Feature-015 T016 — reference video manifest for US3 regression. Ops fills in real COS keys + expected item-count ranges before running run_reference_regression.py. Field contract lives in specs/015-kb-pipeline-real-algorithms/data-model.md § '参考视频集 manifest'.

_field_guide.name: Human label used in verification.md rows (no spaces recommended).
_field_guide.cos_object_key: Absolute COS key under COS_VIDEO_ALL_COCAH or a fixtures/ path uploaded by ops.
_field_guide.tech_category: One of TECH_CATEGORIES in src/services/tech_classifier.py. Job's expected tech_category.
_field_guide.expected_items_min: Integer >=1. Lower bound of total kb_items (visual+audio+merged) the pipeline must produce.
_field_guide.has_speech: bool — if true, the video has coach voice-over; only such videos contribute to SC-006 (audio-path success rate) denominator.
_field_guide.baseline_f002_seconds: Optional float. Feature-002 legacy pipeline wallclock baseline in seconds. When present, --measure-wallclock compares ratio vs this baseline (SC-002 target: <=0.9x).

videos.name: forehand_topspin_sample_1
videos.notes: TODO-ops: 15-30s clear forehand topspin with coach voice-over.

videos.notes: TODO-ops: 10-20s backhand push with clear hip rotation.
